content.en:
Mantuo Dao Ancestor and they left, and Ye Tian and the other Dao Ancestors began to attack the Dark Bluestone Tree.

Thundered!!!

Under the attack again and again, the dark bluestone tree was finally cracked, and drops of dark bluestone liquid flowed out.

"Divide equally according to the agreement!"

A Dao Ancestor said.

Ye Tian nodded and did not refute.

Although he is the strongest now, he said before that he would divide it evenly, so it would be divided.

Moreover, he didn't know much about the Dark Ancient Nest, and if he didn't follow the Xuanqing Dao Ancestor and them, he wouldn't gain anything.

Soon, all the dark bluestone liquid in the body of this dark bluestone tree was divided, and Ye Tian harvested more than three hundred drops of dark bluestone liquid.

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor and they all harvested the dark bluestone liquid, and they were in a good mood, after all, not every time they entered here, they could harvest the dark bluestone liquid.

If you are unlucky, you will not be able to obtain a drop of dark bluestone liquid.

"Let's go, let's go somewhere else!"

Xuanqing Daozu led the way and went to other places.

Next, Ye Tian and the others found another Dark Bluestone Tree, and after fighting with other Dao Ancestors, they occupied this Dark Bluestone Tree.

There were almost no powerful half-step sevenfold ancestors in this area, because the powerful half-step sevenfold ancestors had all left.

Therefore, even if his current strength is not invincible, he can still be ranked in the top ten.

Time passed, and in the competition and fighting, Ye Tian and the others snatched a total of six dark bluestone trees, but they didn't find the dark bluestone trees after that.

"The time is almost up, let's go find the Golden Branch Void Fruit Tree, that's also the harvest!"

Xuanqing Daozu proposed.

They don't need the Golden Branch Void Fruit Tree, but they can leave it to their descendants!

It didn't take long for Ye Tian and the others to find a Golden Branch Void Fruit Tree, but the Golden Branch Void Fruit on this Golden Branch Void Fruit Tree had already been picked.

"Let's go, let's go to another place! There are a lot of primordial artifacts there, and other Dao Ancestors may not go there!"

Xuanqing Daozu proposed.

If it was before, he wouldn't have dared to fight the idea of that golden branch void fruit tree, but now with Ye Tian, they will have confidence, after all, Ye Tian's strength is very strong.

......

"Sure enough, the Golden Branch Void Fruit here hasn't been taken away yet!"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor muttered.

At this time, there were a lot of primordial artifacts around this golden branch void fruit tree, and there were a lot of them, and there were ten primordial artifacts comparable to the half-step sevenfold ancestor level.

"I'll intercept them, and you take the Golden Branch!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Good!"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor they answered.

Immediately, Ye Tian directly went over to fight against these primordial antiquities.

Airplanes!!!!!

The primordial artifacts that shrouded the Endless Black Domain, combined with the power of the Endless Yuan Dao, did their best to suppress them, and a great war broke out.

These primordial antiquities continued to besiege Ye Tian, but with Ye Tian's strength, he resisted with his own strength, and continued to kill one primordial antiquity after another.

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor and they did not hesitate, after all, Ye Tian resisted most of the pressure, if they still couldn't snatch away the Golden Branch Void Fruit, it would be a waste.

Bang!!!!

Many Dao Ancestors made a move, and it didn't take long to snatch the golden branch void fruits on the Golden Branch Void Fruit Tree one by one.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, it's time to retreat!"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor said.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly retreated, and shuttled away with Xuanqing Dao Ancestor.

......

"It's out!"

Ye Tian and Xuanqing Dao Ancestor both came out of the Dark Ancient Lair, not because they didn't want to continue looking for treasure resources, but they didn't dare to stay any longer.

Because the Dark Lair suppressed them, and the number of primordial artifacts inside the Dark Lair increased, and the very powerful primordial artifacts also appeared.

If you continue to stay, those weaker half-step sevenfold ancestors will all be killed, even if they are powerful half-step sevenfold ancestors, they may not last long.

So, they all chose to come out.

Subsequently, they quickly returned to the district boundary.

Archean Plains boundary.

Ye Tian came back and immediately began to retreat and cultivate.

He took out the dark bluestone liquid, and after swallowing and refining, he used the Endless Yuan Dao to refine his body.

This time, he found that the effect of the tempering was many times faster.

"The effect of the dark bluestone liquid is too good, isn't it?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

But if you think about it carefully, it's the first time he's taken the Dark Bluestone Liquid, if the effect is not good, those half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor level Dao Ancestors won't be so hungry for the Dark Bluestone Liquid.

This time, Ye Tian had obtained a lot of dark bluestone liquid, and it wouldn't be long before he could break through to the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm.

But once he broke through to the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, if he wanted to continue to improve his cultivation, his speed would be much slower, and there were very few resources here that would help him quickly improve his cultivation.

When the time comes, he's afraid he'll have to find a way to get out of this area.

Of course, he would only let one copy of the body leave, and the other copy bodies would remain here.

......

Time flies.

Drop after drop of dark bluestone liquid was consumed by Ye Tian, his body became stronger and stronger, under the tempering of the Endless Yuan Dao, his physical strength had already surpassed those half-step sevenfold ancestors, even the physical body of the Xuanqing Dao Ancestor was not necessarily as strong as him.

"The foundation is too strong, and it consumes a lot of resources, if it were someone else, I would have broken through to the half-step sevenfold ancestor realm a long time ago, but I am now almost exhausted by those dark bluestone liquids, and my cultivation has not yet broken through to a half-step sevenfold ancestor!" Ye Tian muttered.

Now he finally knew why those Dao Ancestors who had condensed the Ninefold Dao Fruit had run away in the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm one by one, because if they wanted to become a half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, they consumed too many resources!

Even if you succeed in breaking through, it is only a one-time boundary, and if you want to break the secondary boundary, you still need more resources, who can bear it?

In the blink of an eye, tens of millions of Primordial Era passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's dark bluestone liquid was exhausted, and other resources were almost exhausted, finally allowing him to touch the boundary.

As long as he breaks through this boundary, he can become a half-step sevenfold ancestor, and his strength will be transformed.

Primordial Black Sea.

Ye Tian began to break through, only to see that he directly hit the boundary, and easily broke the boundary.

Bang!!!!

The cultivation was transformed, and the primordial black sea energy of this piece was swallowed up in an instant.

The power of the Endless Yuan Dao was too domineering, and it frantically devoured the surrounding energy, causing the primordial black sea energy in the Upper Spirit High Origin Region to become thinner.

Suddenly, countless Primordial Ancestors panicked.

However, Ye Tian summoned many Primordial Ancestors, saying that he was breaking through and absorbing these Primordial Black Sea energies, which made those Primordial Ancestors breathe a sigh of relief.

The Toothless Gate.

At this time, the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor was very surprised, he knew what Ye Tian's breakthrough represented, it must be Ye Tian's breakthrough to the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm!

"I'm also about to break through, when the time comes, I will find the Endless Dao Ancestor to ask for a copy of the Taixuan Light or the Purple Xuan Light, and I will be sure to impact the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm!"

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor muttered.
